chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 988 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.5823/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.5824/2025 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 10.10.2025 Mr. Parvez Ali Sirohi, Advocate along with applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Applicant / accused Aziz Rehman S/o Ahmed Zaman seeks protective bail in Crime No.1003 of 2025, registered at Police Station City ‘C’ Division, District Rahim Yar Khan, under Sections 457, 380, PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his arrest as NBW has been issued against him. Without touching merits of the case, transitory-cum-protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of seven days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBW shall stand suspended for the period of seven days. Applicant / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of seven days or when the applicant surrenders before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
